articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM Floor Test News LIVE: TVK Government Set To Face Floor Test In Assembly Today

articles.title: Who Is Dave Venturella? Trump's Pick To Lead ICE After Todd Lyons Exit
articles.description: The Trump administration has selected longtime ICE official Dave Venturella to lead ICE in an acting capacity following the expected departure of current acting chief Todd Lyons later this month.

articles.title: MSCI Rejig May 2026: Federal Bank, MCX, NALCO Among New Entrants; RVNL, Kalyan Jewellers Exit
articles.description: MSCI adds Adani Energy Solutions, Federal Bank, MCX, NALCO, Indian Bank, drops RVNL, Kalyan Jewellers, Jubilant Foodworks, Hyundai Motor India, changes effective May 29 2026

articles.title: Buying a house with your spouse? Here’s how it can reduce your tax bill
articles.description: Joint home ownership is emerging as a popular financial strategy among couples looking to maximise tax savings and improve home loan eligibility. Experts say co-owning property can help dual-income households claim higher deductions while sharing long-term financial responsibilities.

articles.title: US stocks fall, oil rallies as Middle East peace hopes fade
articles.description: The U.S. war on Iran has driven oil prices higher, resulting in more expensive gasoline, diesel and jet fuel, and economists expect to see second-round effects in the months ahead.

articles.title: ‘Use more public transport, carpoll’: Delhi CM appeals to residents
articles.description: Delhi's Chief Minister urges residents to use public transport and carpool to conserve fuel amid global energy uncertainty following PM Modi's appeal.

articles.title: eBay says no to GameStop's $56 billion buyout offer; says in letter: Board has thoroughly reviewed your proposal and determined to reject it; read full text
articles.description: eBay's board has rejected GameStop's $55.5 billion buyout proposal, deeming it "neither credible nor attractive." The e-commerce company cited confidence in its standalone prospects, concerns about financing uncertainty, and potential impacts on long-term growth and profitability as key reasons for the rejection. eBay's board believes its current strategy and management are well-positioned for continued sustainable growth and shareholder value.

articles.title: OpenAI chief Sam Altman denies betraying Elon Musk, defends for-profit push at trial
articles.description: The trial, now in its third week, may determine the future of OpenAI and its leadership, as it prepares for a possible initial public offering that could value the business at $1 trillion.

articles.title: Commentary: Why US$70 should be the most worrying number for the LNG market
articles.description: US$70 is the tipping point where liquefied natural gas (LNG) will get squeezed out by renewable alternatives, says David Fickling for Bloomberg Opinion.

articles.title: PWD approves transfer of 24 acres for Metro depot in Majlis Park
articles.description: According to officials, 14.31 acres falling in Pocket H2(B) and 9.69 acres in Pocket H2(C) will be transferred to DMRC. The rate has been fixed at ₹9.9 crore per acre, taking the total cost to ₹238.71 crore

articles.title: FCC Clears SpaceX to Use EchoStar Spectrum, But There Is a $2.4B Problem
articles.description: The FCC imposes a hefty escrow condition on EchoStar to settle conflicts related to its erstwhile carrier ambitions, but EchoStar says that could jeopardize spectrum deals with AT&T and SpaceX.

articles.title: Consumer tagging to curb power pilferage in Bihar
articles.description: The exercise, expected to be completed by June, is being carried out by the North Bihar Power Distribution Company Limited and the South Bihar Power Distribution Company Limited.

articles.description: Clean, desilt all manholes within 15 days: BWSSB chief

articles.title: Republicans pivot to emergency gas tax holiday, affordability agenda as soaring prices anger voters
articles.description: Skyrocketing inflation, rising gasoline prices and crushing housing costs have pressured Republicans in Congress to make an emergency pivot to affordability measures as they face an increasingly dissatisfied electorate that could boot them out of the majority in November.

articles.title: Govt to introduce new system for ‘raiyati’ land deals soon
articles.description: In a pioneering effort to bolster land transaction integrity, Bihar has launched a cutting-edge e-registration system. This innovation allows prospective buyers to easily access comprehensive official land records prior to the registration of raiyati land. Aimed at reducing fraud and legal disputes, this initiative is part of the larger 'Sabka Samman, Jeevan Aasaan' initiative.

articles.title: TURN SIMHASTHA
articles.description: Ujjain plans 29 km of new ghats and 6 km upgrades for Simhastha 2028, adding multiple entry-exit points on both riverbanks to ease crowds and improve emergency access.

articles.title: West Asia crisis a wake-up call for self-reliance: Commerce and industry minister Piyush Goyal
articles.description: The West Asia crisis serves as a crucial reminder for Indian industries to boost self-reliance and efficiency. Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal urged businesses to reduce import dependency and focus on indigenous design and manufacturing. He also highlighted the need for faster electric vehicle adoption to cut oil bills.

articles.title: Deputy CM defends PM’s economic advisory
articles.description: Patna: Deputy CM Vijay Kumar Choudhary on Tuesday defended Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s seven-point advisory aimed at protecting the country’s forei.

articles.title: Jewellers fear demand dip after PM’s appeal
articles.description: In Buxar, jewellery merchants express deep concern following Prime Minister Modi's suggestion to curtail gold purchases. They argue that such measures could jeopardize jobs and threaten the livelihood of small enterprises. Gold, they insist, holds immense cultural value and provides financial security for many rural and middle-class households.

articles.title: South Korea may use AI-driven tax gains to pay citizens: Top policymaker
articles.description: A South Korean policymaker suggested a citizen dividend funded by AI profit taxes, sparking market volatility. The proposal aimed to redistribute gains from the AI boom, but was later clarified to target excess tax revenue rather than a new corporate levy, leading to a partial recovery in stocks.

articles.title: US Senate approves Kevin Warsh for Fed Board, chair confirmation next
articles.description: The Senate has confirmed Kevin Warsh to the Federal Reserve Board of Governors. A vote for his chairmanship is expected soon. This confirmation follows a lifted blockade by Senator Thom Tillis. The move comes as President Trump pushes for lower interest rates. Inflation is currently surging, presenting a challenge for the Fed.

articles.title: Kejriwal seeks transparency on economic situation
articles.description: Kejriwal demands transparency from the government on the economic crisis, urging fairness in sacrifices across all social classes.

articles.title: ‘Govt employees must start work by 10.15 am’
articles.description: Kolkata: In a significant move towards overhauling administrative discipline, the state govt on Tuesday issued a stern directive regarding office timi.

articles.title: Hotel body welcomes PM’s domestic travel appeal
articles.description: Odisha's hotel and restaurant association lauded Prime Minister Modi's call for domestic travel, seeing it as a significant boost for the nation's tourism and hospitality. This focus on local tourism promises to stimulate demand, increase spending, and accelerate economic activity.

articles.title: Outbound travel slows as Indians rethink foreign holidays amid crisis and costs

While large-scale cancellations haven't occurred, the focus is shifting towards boosting domestic tourism and its economic benefits.

articles.title: Gurugram Sustains Real Estate Growth Amid Rapid Urban Expansion
articles.description: Delhi NCR [India], May 12: Few cities in India have transformed as rapidly as Gurugram. Over the last two decades, the city has evolved from a peripheral satellite town into one of the country's most influential corporate and residential hubs, attracting multinational companies, institutional capital and a constantly expanding urban population.
